stemHtml: There is heavy drizzle at the destination airport. How do you expect the visibility in the short final to be?

options.a: If there is fog, visibility could be as low as 500 m, but with NO fog the visibility could be at least 3 000 m.
options.b: Visibility could be up to 2 000 m, but will be reduced when the sun is low on the horizon.
options.c: The visibility should be at least 2 000 m.
options.d: The visibility could be as low as 500 m.
